meta_description: AI-powered website builder for education. Create a website for school, courses, or learning platform in 5 minutes. No code. Try Promto free.
og_description: AI website builder for education: schools, courses, tutors. Create a site in 5 minutes. No code or designer needed.
hero_subtitle: Describe your educational activity — AI will create a site in 5 minutes.
hero_placeholder: Describe what website you need for your business...

advantages.title: AI Instead of Developer
advantages.description: AI-powered builder independently writes texts, selects structure and design for the educational niche.

advantages.title: All Education Niches
advantages.description: Schools, courses, tutors, kindergartens, music schools, training centers — the builder adapts to any niche.

advantages.title: 5 Minutes to Create
advantages.description: Forget weeks of development. Promto builder creates a ready site in minutes.

advantages.title: SEO for Students
advantages.description: Site is optimized for search engines — parents and students will find you through Google and Yandex.

advantages.title: Reliable Hosting
advantages.description: SSL certificate, fast loading, stable operation — educational organization sites work without failures.

advantages.title: Easy Management
advantages.description: Add courses, teachers, news — update the site without a programmer or designer.

how_it_works.title: Choose Your Niche
how_it_works.description: Describe your educational activity: school, courses, tutoring, kindergarten, training center.

how_it_works.title: AI Creates the Site
how_it_works.description: Builder generates structure, writes texts, and selects design specific to your educational organization.

how_it_works.title: Set Up Content
how_it_works.description: Add course programs, teachers, photos, prices — fill the site with your content.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Click Publish — the site is ready. Share the link with students and parents.

faq.question: What educational organizations is the builder suitable for?
faq.answer: The builder is suitable for online schools, courses, tutors, kindergartens, training centers, music schools, and other educational organizations.

faq.question: Is coding needed to work with the builder?
faq.answer: No. The builder is completely visual — you describe the task in text, and AI creates a ready site. No code or technical knowledge needed.

faq.question: Can I add multiple branches or cities?
faq.answer: Yes. You can specify addresses, contacts, and specifics for each branch — information is displayed on the site.

faq.question: Is there a news or blog section?
faq.answer: Yes. A news and articles section is available for placing useful content — this helps with SEO and informs parents.

faq.question: What is Promto?
faq.answer: Promto is an AI website builder for education and business. You describe the task, the system creates a ready site in minutes.

faq.question: How much does using the builder cost?
faq.answer: You can start for free. Paid plans unlock custom domain, analytics, and extended features.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI builder will do all the work for you. No code or designer needed.
cta_final_subtitle: AI builder will create a website for school, courses, or tutor in 5 minutes.
